titleStmt.title: SII 26.483: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 483. (A.R. No. 460 of 1909.) ŚUTTAMALLI, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of land, 10 mā in extent, as tax-free dēvadāna, made by the king, for worship and offerings in the temple of the god Bagavatīśvaramuḍaiyār of Śuttamalli alias Vīraviṉōdach-chaturvvēdimaṅgalam in Mēl-Vēmba-nāḍu. It is stated that the land belonged as jīvitam to a certain Śrīvallava Savaṉādarāyar, an Aṅgavayijya of Rājarāja-chaturvvēdimaṅgalam in Muḷḷi-nāḍu and that it was taken over from him and was assigned to the temple.

The signatories were Arayaṉ Kuvalayachandiraṉ alias [Pūḻi]yaṉ Pallavarayaṉ of Koḻuvaṉūr in Kīḻkūṟṟu in Miḻalaik-kūṟṟam, Araiyaṉ Sri •••• dēvaṉ alias Viṇṇāḍuḍaiyāṉ of the same place, and Araiyaṉ, Tuḍaiyāṉ alias Pallavāājaṉ of Uḻakkudi in [. .]ndaiyirukkai in Madurōdaya-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tri
bhuvanacakravatti
konerimeṉkoṇ
ṭāṉ melvempa nā
ṭṭuc cuttamaliyā
na vīraviṉotac
caturvvetimaṅkalat
tu pakavaniśvaramuṭaiyār
koyilil śrīkāriyañcey
vāṉukkum tevakaṉmikkum
śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇice
yvāṉukkum . Ittevaṟkut tirup
paṭimāṟ ṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum ni
mantaṅkaḻukku Antarāya muṭpaṭat
tevatāna Iṟaiyiliyāy Iṟuppatāka
muḷḷināṭṭu rājarājacaturvvetimaṅ
kalattu kār pacāṉam viḷaiyunilattu
Aṅkavayijyaril śrīvallava savaṉātarā
yar jīvitamāṉa nilattilivarai jīvi
tan tavirntu Ivvūril kaṭamai yiṟu
kkuṅkolāl pattumā nilam Eḻā
vatu pacāṉamutal Antarāya muṭpaṭa
tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu naṅke
ḻvipum variyilā reḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyu
n taraccoṉṉom Ippaṭi cantirātitta
vaṟ celvatākak kalliluñ cempilu
m veṭṭivittukkoḷka Ivai miḻa
laik kūṟṟattuk kiḻ kūṟṟuk koḻuvaṉū
ruṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ kuvalayacan=tiraṉāna pūḻi
yaṉ pallavarayaṉeḻuttu yāṇṭu
3 100 5 10 7000 Ivai miḻalaik kūṟṟattu kiḻkūṟ
ṟuk koḻuvaṉūruṭaiyā ṉaraiyaṉ śrī
tevaṉāṉa viṇṇā
ṭuṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu I
vai maturotaya vaḷaṉāṭṭu
ntaiyirukkai Uḻakkuṭiyarai
tuṭaiyāṉāṉa pallavarājaṉe
ḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.483 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
